**Determining upcoming strike**

I need to evaluate the document to see if it’s announcing a new strike. The Italian page refers to a 24-hour general strike on November 28, 2025, with guaranteed service times listed for specific hours. This clearly indicates it’s an upcoming strike. So, I’ll set isStrike to true. Next, I have to extract details for the strike, including start and end dates and any guarantees, converting dates into the required format.
